description: Templates for organizational structure, employee onboarding flows, team dynamics workshops, performance evaluation frameworks, and career growth planning — from startup org charts to enterprise-scale people operations

templates.name: Organization Chart
templates.description: Visual organization chart mapping reporting lines, department groupings, role cards with key responsibilities, headcount summaries, and organizational health flags — providing a clear picture of how a company or team is structured

templates.name: New Hire Onboarding Board
templates.description: Structured onboarding board guiding new hires through their first 90 days with week-by-week task checklists, key contacts, tools setup, culture introduction, and 30-60-90 day milestone goals

templates.name: Team Building Activity Board
templates.description: Collaborative workshop board for team building sessions — mapping team values, identifying strengths, establishing working agreements, sharing fun facts, and aligning on collaboration preferences

templates.name: Performance Review Framework
templates.description: Structured performance review board for evaluations — reviewing goals and OKRs, assessing competencies, gathering 360-degree feedback, building development plans, and mapping career growth paths
